summary: Verified SEO-only change on /wine-tour landing: document.title and <meta name=description> now lead with 'Chauffeur / Private Driver / Transportation' framing while the visible page body is unchanged. Ran regression on /airport, /wedding, /corporate, /party-bus, /limo to confirm no cross-bleed of pageTitle/metaDescription.

test_results.wine_tour_title_exact_match: PASS — 'Napa Valley Chauffeur · Wine Country Private Driver — TuranEliteLimo'

wine_tour_body_unchanged.Price strip: From $95/hour · 6-hour mini: PASS — visible in screenshot; rendered as 'FROM' (small uppercase label) + '$95/hour · 6-hour minimum · all-inclusive' (gold). innerText join produced 'FROM ' which made a literal substring match miss in the script, but the price strip is intact and unchanged.

regression_other_landings./airport: PASS — title: 'Bay Area Airport Limo · SFO OAK SJC Chauffeur — TuranEliteLimo' (distinct)
regression_other_landings./wedding: PASS — title: 'Bay Area Wedding Limo · Bridal Chauffeur Service — TuranEliteLimo' (distinct)
regression_other_landings./corporate: PASS — title: 'Silicon Valley Corporate Chauffeur · Executive Transfers — TuranEliteLimo' (distinct)
regression_other_landings./party-bus: PASS — title: 'Bay Area Party Bus Rental · 14–30 Passenger Limo Coach — TuranEliteLimo' (distinct)
regression_other_landings./limo: PASS — title: 'TuranEliteLimo · Bay Area Luxury Chauffeur · SFO/OAK/SJC Airport Transfers, Weddings & Wine Tours' (distinct; mentions own service)

critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.jsx useEffect on lines 76-88 correctly hooks pageTitle into document.title and patches the global <meta name=description>. Note: meta tag is shared across SPA routes, so first-paint title/desc on hard-reload is whatever index.html ships before React mounts. For Google Ads crawler this is fine (JS-rendered description is read by Googlebot post-render), but for any non-JS crawler the index.html static description still wins. Not in scope of this iteration but worth flagging.
og:title and og:description in index.html intentionally remain brand-wide per the request — confirmed not changed per page, which is correct behavior.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Wine-tour SEO change (pageTitle + metaDescription) verified live at https://limo-experience-1.preview.emergentagent.com/wine-tour. Visible body content untouched. No cross-bleed into /airport, /wedding, /corporate, /party-bus, /limo. og:title/og:description in index.html are intentionally brand-wide and should NOT be flagged.
